items.question: Which areas do you deliver to?
items.answer: We deliver across the city. Share your location on WhatsApp and we'll confirm delivery feasibility and estimated timing instantly. For corporate and bulk orders, we cover a wider radius.

items.question: How does the meal subscription work?
items.answer: Pick a weekly (₹999) or monthly (₹3,499) plan, choose your menu preferences, and we deliver fresh meals daily. You can pause, skip or modify your plan anytime with one WhatsApp message.

items.question: Can I place bulk or party orders?
items.answer: Yes — we handle bulk orders for birthdays, weddings, apartment community events and corporate gatherings. Message us your date, headcount and preferences, and we'll send a custom menu and quote.

items.question: Is the food really fresh?
items.answer: Absolutely. Everything is cooked fresh each morning in our hygienic kitchen. We don't freeze, pre-pack or reheat meals. What you eat today was cooked today.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept UPI, all major debit/credit cards, bank transfers and cash on delivery. Subscription payments can be made weekly or monthly. For corporate accounts, we offer weekly invoicing.

items.question: How early should I place my order?
items.answer: Daily meals can be ordered the same day (subject to slot availability). For bulk and catering orders, we recommend booking at least 48 hours in advance.

items.question: Can I customise my meal or request a special diet?
items.answer: Yes. Tell us about allergies, spice preferences, diet restrictions (jain, no onion-garlic, diabetic-friendly) and we'll tailor your meals accordingly.

items.question: Do you cater for corporate offices?
items.answer: Yes — we run daily office lunch programs and one-time team catering for companies of all sizes. We handle delivery, packing and weekly invoicing.

items.question: What are your business hours?
items.answer: We're open Monday to Sunday, 7:00 AM to 10:00 PM. WhatsApp orders are responded to during these hours.
